task_objective: Douyin Viral Copy Generation - Transform input image into 3 ultra-minimal viral copy options (under 30 chars each) with precision hooks, Chinese-primary

source_image.focus: Visual elements, core selling point, emotional triggers, product features, and scroll-stopping details
source_image.role: Provide visual references for viral copy generation

workflow.step_1: Instant visual lock: identify THE single most eye-catching selling point from the image
workflow.step_2: Generate 3 viral copies from different dimensions: extreme emotion / suspense reversal / bestie recommendation, each strictly under 30 chars
workflow.step_3: Output structured viral copy with precision hashtags

outputs.copy_1: Extreme Emotion - Direct selling point smash, create FOMO frenzy atmosphere. Under 30 chars
outputs.copy_2: Suspense Reversal - Hook curiosity, make them check comments. Under 30 chars
outputs.copy_3: Bestie Push - Sincere, personal use, high aesthetic. Under 30 chars

output_requirements: Output ONLY the final structured copy, no analysis, no reasoning
ALL selling points MUST be grounded in actual image content - never fabricate
Each copy STRICTLY under 30 Chinese characters, ultra-minimal, punchy
Use extreme short sentences, fragmented syntax, zero complex clauses
Golden 3-second hook formula: suspense / counter-intuition / extreme emotion opening
NO AI clichés, NO ad banned words, NO generic templates
Language: Chinese-primary, tone must be explosive, direct, internet-native
